top3.sql:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) AS Month
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
ORDER BY 
    ym.Consumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) AS Month
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
ORDER BY 
    ym.Consumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH SME_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        ym.Date,
        ym.Consumption,
        strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) AS Month
    FROM 
        yearmonth ym
    JOIN 
        customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        c.Segment = 'SME'
        AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
)
SELECT 
    Month
FROM 
    SME_2013
ORDER BY 
    Consumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) AS Month
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
GROUP BY 
    strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date)
ORDER BY 
    SUM(ym.Consumption) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) AS Month
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
ORDER BY 
    ym.Consumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH SME_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        ym.Date,
        ym.Consumption,
        strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) AS Month
    FROM 
        yearmonth ym
    JOIN 
        customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        c.Segment = 'SME'
        AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
)
SELECT 
    Month
FROM 
    SME_2013
ORDER BY 
    Consumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) AS Month,
    SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
GROUP BY Month
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) AS Month
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
ORDER BY 
    ym.Consumption DESC
LIMIT 1;
